eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Okanogan, WA; at 10:02 AM ON MAY 4, 2026 Effective until 11:02 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is a test, only a test of the Emergency Alert System in Okanogan County. 

Issued by Okanogan County Emergency Management.

If this had been an actual emergency, you would have been instructed what to do.  

No Action is required.

The following tones will conclude this test.
